name: Cayden's Brew (Triple)
description:
Activate 1 Interact

Cayden's brew is like rich beer or ale, with a golden-brown color and foamy head. For 1 hour after you drink it, you have a +1 item bonus to saving throws against fear effects. Also, you can use a single action to breathe out a of intoxicating vapor with a burp that can be heard for 100 feet. Any creature in the vapor must attempt a saving throw. After you use this breath weapon, you can't do so again for [[/r 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is Clumsy 1 and Stupefied 1 for 1 round.

Failure The creature is clumsy 1 and stupefied 1 for [[/r 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.

Critical Failure The creature becomes Clumsy 2, Stupefied 2, and Sickened 1. The clumsy and stupefied conditions last until [[/r 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds} after the sickened condition ends.
